pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: index.html
  standalone: true
  embed-resources: true
  title-prefix: Nils Kottmann
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method:
    method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  css:
    - styles.css
  toc: false
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  lang: en
  page-layout: full
  date-format: MMM YYYY
  theme:
    light:
      - flatly
      - mozilla.scss
  title: Portfolio
  listing:
    contents: projects
    type: grid
    sort: date desc
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: true
    feed: true
  title-block-banner: true
